message:
feat(tui): input smoothness pass — drag jitter filter + hover stabilization (1mfw3.5)

Add input smoothness infrastructure to reduce pointer noise:
- Drag jitter filter: suppress LeftDrag events with < 2-cell movement
- Position tracking: last_mouse_pos updated on click/drag, cleared on release
- Hover stabilization: saved-view drag row changes require 80ms settle time
  to prevent flickering when crossing thin row boundaries
- 6 new tests covering jitter suppression, threshold acceptance, state cleanup,
  first-drag passthrough, settle initialization, and scroll pass-through

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
